sub_modules.ifft16_pair_index: Combinational radix-2 DIT address and twiddle-index generator for each stage and butterfly iteration.
sub_modules.ifft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 IFFT twiddle lookup table for N=16 using the required positive sine convention.
sub_modules.ifft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with rounded Q1.15 complex rotation.
sub_modules.ifft16_output_scale: Combinational arithmetic right-shift output normalizer implementing final IFFT divide-by-16 scaling.
